message.content:
@startuml
title US029 - As Project Manager, I want to start a sprint.

actor "Project Manager" as PM1 at top left 35% width .4em height 6px #white black line thickness 8pt color white 
participant ": StartSprintRoute\n" as SSR  
participant ": StartSprintController\n" as SSC   
participant ": StartSprintService\n" as SSS    
participant "dto : SprintDTO\n" as SDTO     
participant ": Project\n" as P      
participant ": SprintDomainService\n" as SDS       
database ": ResourceStore\n" as RS        
queue ": SprintStore\n" as SS         


PM1 ->> SSR:Asks to start a Sprint 

activate SSR  

    activate SSR
    
        note right of SSR:startSprint(sprintDTO) 
        
            SSR->>+SDTO:sprintID
            
                SSDO-->-SR:return 
            
                
            
            SR -->+P:getTeam()
            
               return projectTeam
                
               
           
           SR-->> +RS:SprintDuration()
          
              return duration
        
         endnote
     
     deactivate SSR
   
   alt if validation fails then
      
      loop for each error do
         
      	alt check date validity first before checking team availability next step below... etc..etc....until all checks pass successfully without errors occurring during execution flow control logic implementation phase completion status update notification message sent back up through layers until reaching user interface layer where final result displayed accordingly based upon outcome
